name: 9p24_duplication_syndrome
description: 9p24 trisomy/duplication syndrome — distal 9p duplication (often unbalanced t(X;9) or de novo) overlapping DMRT1/DMRT2/DMRT3 cluster. Recurrent SD blocks at 9p24 (notably 9p24.3 subtelomeric duplicons and the KANK1/DOCK8 paralog cassettes) mediate a subset. JAK2/CD274 (PD-L1) duplications recurrent in cancer (Hodgkin lymphoma).

architecture.internal_structure: Subtelomeric SD cluster + 9p24.3 KANK1 SD; critical genes DMRT1/2/3 (sex reversal on loss; female-to-male DSD on duplication), DOCK8, KANK1. JAK2 + CD274/PDCD1LG2 amplification recurrent in classical Hodgkin and PMBL.

related_diseases: 9p deletion syndrome (Alfi syndrome, 46,XY DSD via DMRT loss)
